author: gurukamath
content:
Yeah. The decision has to be whether we go with the "split" or implement Dragan's suggestion.
The split is conceptually cleaner imo and was agreed upon by all clients except reth iirc.
However, the counter argument made was that Dragan's proposal allows clients optimise the implementation. So it would be good to have the clients look at it and agree if its feasible or not. (I don't think we've got a lot of feedback from other clients on it)

author: draganrakita
content: I guess if people want to optimize for BAL, than my proposal is best outcome. Optimizing for only eip7702 case is underwhelming and it is the firt time that we break warming and BAL bond.
